creator: reshadpatuck1@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Carlos J. Puga Medina from comment #5)

Hey patched the ports tree with your patch and built, still no go.

However found https://github.com/gliaskos/freebsd-chromium and built that.

It seems to work.

I believe the last patch to that repository was yours "Update chromium to 58.0.3029.110 and add initial headless support".

That works great, would love to see it in head soon.

Also with chromium 59 out soon (few weeks) id love to help test --headless with pdf support for you.

Thnaks
